2606.09392.title: From Coarse to Fine: Managing Temporal Granularity in Spatio-Temporal Data for Fine-Grained Traffic Prediction
2606.09392.paper_summary: Efficient acquisition, storage, and utilization of traffic data are critical challenges in spatio-temporal data management. Most traffic data systems collect and store observations at fixed, coarse-grained temporal intervals to reduce storage and computation costs. However, such coarse-grained data severely limits downstream applications that require predictions at a finer temporal granularity. Collecting and maintaining fine-grained traffic data across all locations and time periods would impose a substantial burden on database storage and preprocessing pipelines. To address this temporal granularity mismatch, we formulate a novel problem: predicting fine-grained future traffic using coarse-grained sampled data. We propose the Spatial-Temporal Refinement Predictor (STRP), a granularity-aware framework for spatio-temporal data systems. STRP integrates two components: Tree Convolution for efficient and interpretable spatial dependency modeling, and Inverse Dilated Convolution for progressive temporal extrapolation. STRP supports two practical prediction settings: window-based and duration-based, to handle different forms of granularity mismatch. Experiments on six benchmark datasets show that STRP significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both accuracy and efficiency. Our work offers a practical and interpretable approach to managing granularity mismatches in spatio-temporal traffic data systems.
2606.09392.paper_summary_zh: 有效獲取、儲存和利用交通數據是時空數據管理中的關鍵挑戰。大多數交通數據系統在固定的、粗粒度的時間間隔內收集和儲存觀察數據，以降低儲存和計算成本。然而，這種粗粒度數據嚴重限制了需要更細粒度預測的下游應用。收集和維護所有地點和時間段的細粒度交通數據將對數據庫儲存和預處理管道造成重大負擔。為了解決這一時間粒度不匹配的問題，我們提出了一個新問題：使用粗粒度抽樣數據來預測細粒度的未來交通。我們提出了時空細化預測器（STRP），這是一個考慮粒度的時空數據系統框架。STRP整合了兩個組件：樹卷積，用於高效且可解釋的空間依賴建模，以及逆擴張卷積，用於逐步的時間外推。STRP支持兩種實用的預測設置：基於窗口的和基於持續時間的，以處理不同形式的粒度不匹配。在六個基準數據集上的實驗顯示，STRP在準確性和效率上顯著超越了最先進的基線。我們的工作提供了一種實用且可解釋的方法來管理時空交通數據系統中的粒度不匹配問題。
2606.09392.author: Shuhao Li et.al.
2606.09392.authors: Shuhao Li, Weidong Yang, Yue Cui, Zizhuo Xu, Lipeng Ma, Fan Zhang, Xiaofang Zhou
